channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年04月06日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] Explosives discovered near gas pipeline to Hungary, says Serbia's president
item.description: Powerful explosives were found near the Balkan Stream pipeline in Serbia that carries Russian gas to Hungary, the leaders of the two countries said on Sunday, triggering political scrutiny in Hungary

item.title: [未译] Fuel prices are soaring. Plastic could be next.
item.description: As the war in Iran continues to engulf the Middle East and the Strait of Hormuz stays closed, one of the most visible global economic ripple effects has been fossil-fuel prices. In particular, you can

item.title: [未译] As Artemis II zooms to the Moon, everything seems to be going swimmingly
item.description: The cabin was colder on Thursday, but the crew has been able to adjust the temperature.

item.title: [未译] If you thought the speed of writing code was your problem - you have bigger problems
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/05o8yu/if_you_thought_speed_writing_code_was_your">Comments</a></p>

item.title: [未译] Four things we’d need to put data centers in space
item.description: MIT Technology Review Explains: Let our writers untangle the complex, messy world of technology to help you understand what’s coming next. You can read more from the series here. In January, Elon Musk

item.title: [未译] Best Ski Clothes (2026): Patagonia, Arc’teryx, Burton, and More
item.description: From weatherproof jackets and pants to puffers, gloves, and socks, WIRED’s winter sports experts have you covered.

item.title: [未译] Top Wall Street analysts see strong growth potential in these 3 stocks
item.description: Investors should look beyond short-term volatility and consider these growth stocks that analysts see upside for, according to TipRanks.

item.title: [未译] Copilot is ‘for entertainment purposes only,’ according to Microsoft’s terms of use
item.description: AI skeptics aren’t the only ones warning users not to unthinkingly trust models’ outputs — that’s what the AI companies say themselves in their terms of service.

item.title: [未译] Israel launches new strikes on Lebanon, forces closure of Syria border crossing
item.description: Israeli airstrikes on Beirut and southern Lebanon on Sunday killed at least 11 people, including a family of six, and wounded dozens more. The attacks also prompted Syria to temporarily close its main

item.title: [未译] German men could require military permission to leave country for more than three months
item.description: German men aged between 17 and 45 could have to get military approval if they want to leave the country for more than three months, according to recent changes to the law.

item.title: [未译] Zohran Mamdani and the business exodus? New York's office real estate market is up under new mayor
item.description: Reports Apollo Global Management is planning a second HQ in the US South renewed debate over a business exodus under NYC Mayor Mamdani. Data doesn't support it.

item.title: [未译] 'Silent killers': How AI start-ups are trying to solve one of the retail industry's biggest problems
item.description: The rapid evolution of generative AI has finally made these applications good enough to meaningfully impact retailers' bottom lines.

item.title: [未译] The CA Minimum Wage Increase: Summing Up

item.title: [未译] OpenAI新模型不是GPTX！全新预训练“土豆”曝光，Sora成弃子的原因找到了
item.description: 正面回应了和Anthropic的竞争

item.title: [未译] 太初元碁向员工发放百亿算力token并将共建高校AI科教融合学院

item.description: 1. Josefina Aguilar Alcantara, RIP (NYT). 2. Move abroad so you can default on your student debt (NYT). 3. History of golf course bunkers (WSJ). 4. Four reasons why possible aliens might make you more ambitious. 5. New learnings on octopuses and sex.

item.title: [未译] 'Anything but autos': Can defense save Europe’s ailing car industry?
item.description: The transition from wheels to weapons is achievable in part because many of the underlying skills are highly transferable, according to experts.

item.title: [未译] Los Thuthanaka’s Wak’a is a mellower follow-up to last year’s surprise Pitchfork favorite
item.description: Los Thuthanaka basically came out of nowhere last year to capture Pitchfork's album of the year with their self-titled debut. Because it wasn't available on streaming, it

item.title: [未译] As people look for ways to make new friends, here are the apps promising to help
item.description: We've compiled a list of friendship apps, from friend discovery platforms like BFF to event-focused ones like Timeleft.

item.title: [未译] Auden on Iceland
item.description: If you have no particular intellectual interests or ambitions and are content with the company of your family and friends, then life on Iceland must be very pleasant, because the inhabitants are friendly, tolerant, and sane. They are genuinely proud

item.title: [未译] Suno is a music copyright nightmare
item.description: AI music platform Suno's policy is that it does not permit the use of copyrighted material. You can upload your own tracks to remix or set your original lyrics to AI-gene

item.title: [未译] TechCrunch Mobility: ‘A stunning lack of transparency’

item.title: [未译] Good sentences
item.description: This leads us to the next of Freud’s major contributions to neuroscience: his realization that cognition is, at bottom, wishful. That is from the new and notable Mark Solms, The Only Cure: Freud and the Neuroscience of Mental Healing. This is

item.title: [未译] In Japan, the robot isn’t coming for your job; it’s filling the one nobody wants
item.description: Driven by labor shortages, Japan is pushing physical AI from pilot projects into real-world deployment.

item.title: [未译] Embattled startup Delve has ‘parted ways’ with Y Combinator
item.description: The controversy around Delve appears to have cost the compliance startup its relationship with accelerator Y Combinator.

item.title: [未译] Nanocode: The best Claude Code that $200 can buy in pure JAX on TPUs

item.title: [未译] CBP facility codes sure seem to have leaked via online flashcards
item.description: Quizlet flashcards seem to include sensitive information about gate security at CBP locations.

item.title: [未译] Heatbit Maxi Pro Review: a Space Heater That Also Mines Bitcoin
item.description: Electricity rates have gotten so atrocious that this Heatbit wants to offset your costs with bitcoin mining. But the math doesn't add up.

item.title: [未译] Sony’s PS5 Price Hikes Prove This Console Generation Is Far From Over. Good.
item.description: The current console generation may last longer than anyone expects.
